DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER'S TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Jenny Li, Esq., of Low, Ball, & Lynch (415) 981-6630, appearing for Defendant and moving party. There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained, ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
